title: OP Chest
description: Turn chests into overpowered loot sources for exciting and rewarding exploration.
body:
The Chests Drop OP Items datapack makes opening chests extremely rewarding. Loot chests can now contain overpowered items, rare resources, and enchanted gear, turning exploration and dungeon raiding into a fast and exciting progression system.

This datapack is perfect for survival worlds, adventure maps, and multiplayer servers where loot feels powerful and exploration is highly rewarding. It works smoothly with vanilla mechanics while adding a fun and chaotic twist to chest loot.

Features

Chests contain OP items and rare loot

Includes enchanted weapons, tools, and armor

Greatly boosts exploration rewards

Fun and fast-paced survival gameplay

Compatible with vanilla Minecraft loot mechanics

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
